text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah, come on! Where is everyone?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Bamboo Memory in the hallway looking
unusually disturbed.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well... the disciplinary committee has a meeting
scheduled today, but not everyone has shown up
yet! And we've had a lot of important things to
cover recently!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Like how too many students are bringing personal
items to class! And improving our efforts to get
everyone to stop sleeping during morning
practice!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Or whether or not we should be holding seminars
on how to speak to crows so we can keep them
off the crops! We're not going to be able to talk
about any of this at this rate!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member A
text_block_list.text: Bamboo! I found everyone! F-follow me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There you all are! Let's hurry up and start the
mee—

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Members
text_block_list.text:
No! We've had it! We've worked hard enough,
and we want the day off!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any idea what you're saying?! Why
are you acting so childish?!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Members
text_block_list.text:
Tell her, Mom! We've been working so hard,
right?! We deserve a break, right?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes! ♪ Of course you do, since you're all so
wonderful! Go ahead and take a rest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: C-Creek?! What the heck are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? We're all just—

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member B
text_block_list.text:
All right, that does it for patrolling the school!
Phew... I'm beat!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! ♪ You've been working so hard, haven't
you? Why not take a little break? I have some
delicious tea and snacks for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member C
text_block_list.text: Hey! Heeey! Sigh... Where'd she go? She should be finished patrolling by now...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh! ♪ How lovely! You came looking for your
friend! You deserve a special reward for being
such a good girl! ♪

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member B
text_block_list.text: Yay! Let's share these cookies!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...And everyone else showed up while we were at
it. So we've been relaxing and enjoying each
other's company.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, everyone... You were all really that tired? I
had no idea!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I'm sorry, everyone! I take full
responsibility... And now, I'll reawaken your sense
of discipline!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Repeat after me! The five tenets of the
disciplinary committee are...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
One! A lax mentality leads to lax discipline!
Two! Instruct with red-hot passion, but also love!
Three! Rule-breaking shall not be tolerated!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Members
text_block_list.text:
...?
Hrmph?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Four! Dreams shall not be tread upon!
Five! Guide troublemakers 24/7/365!
One! A lax mentality...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory recites the tenets at the top of
her voice over and over until she begins losing her
voice.

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member B
text_block_list.text: A lax mentality... leads to... lax discipline!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's right! We're the ones who help everyone
keep their school life safe and sound! We must
remember that!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Members
text_block_list.text:
I-instruct with passion, but also... love!
Three... Rule breaking shall... not be tolerated...
Four! Dreams shall... not be tread upon!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member B
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ch-Chair! What's happening to me?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness, everyone! You've reawakened
your disciplinary spirit!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Creek! Our committee is in
your debt! Thank you for everything!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are we already finished? That's too bad... I've
got futons prepared in case anyone needs a nap...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I just can't believe I didn't notice how everyone
was feeling... What an unacceptable oversight for
the head of the disciplinary committee!
choice_data_list:
Makes you want to cherish the power of
teamwork, huh?

Makes you want to cherish the power of
teamwork, huh?

We could learn from Super Creek's impressive
example.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I just can't believe I didn't notice how everyone
was feeling... What an unacceptable oversight for
the head of the disciplinary committee!
choice_data_list:
Makes you want to cherish the power of
teamwork, huh?

Makes you want to cherish the power of
teamwork, huh?

We could learn from Super Creek's impressive
example.

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member A
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's remember why we joined the
committee in the first place and get back to work!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Discipline committee! Formation
A!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Members
text_block_list.text:
Aye-aye! Presenting the "Disciplinary
Committee's Hype Pose!"

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! You're all so neat and orderly!
Beautiful! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the disciplinary committee has an
earnest discussion amongst themselves, and they
all become more unified.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm, that's a good point! Thanks to Creek,
everyone is looking really refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey, Creek! I have a favor to ask you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you could throw one of your
pampering parties so I can watch and learn how
you do it?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh! Could I?! I'd be more than happy to! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm a bit worried, but I suppose this will help the disciplinary committee solve all the problems they've been dealing with... maybe.
